title: Open the next task with a due date of today once the previous task is marked as done

posts.author: assenovayana (Ognyana Asenova)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there!

Is there any way to automate Monday to automatically open the next task with a due date of today once the previous task is marked as done?

Also, I need to set Monday.com to open the next task (switch status to ready to start work). Has anyone figured out a way to do it?. Further, is there a way around getting the previous tasks that’s already marked with done switched back to ready to start work when reopened?

Many thanks!

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Ognyana,

To clarify, when you say open the task are you referring to automatically opening the updates section of the item?

In regard to your next question, can I ask if a specific automation recipe under our dependencies section could be useful for you here? This is the one I am referring to:

Could this be a step forward in setting that next dependent task to a specific status?

posts.author: assenovayana (Ognyana Asenova)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Bianca,

I meant to just amend the status and due date of the following task.
I’ll try this workaround you mentioned!

Thanks!
